case_title: WU, DAVID VS LI, ZONG YUE

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION FEB-26-2001, CONTINUED BY COURT TO APR-23-2001 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506 ORDER SIGNED.
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LI, ZONG YUE
DEFT.'S REQUEST FOR ORDERED CONTINUANCE ON 4/23/01 AT 6:30PM,PAID $10 CASH.
DEFENDANT REQUEST TO CONTINUE HEARING DATE TO AUGUST 31, 2001(FRIDAY) AT 6:30 PM(MONDAY NIGHTS ONLY) SENT TO THE COMMISSIONER FOR APPROVAL.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WU, DAVID RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LI, ZONG YUE $2,905.00 PRINCIPAL, $55.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,960.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
DEFENDANT REQUEST FOR A CONTINUANCE TO BE SIGNED BY JUDGE, DATE REQUESTED 2/12/01 3:30 PM. $10.00 FEE PAID.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JAN-11-2001, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO FEB-26-2001 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
JUDGMENT ASSIGNED BY JUDGMENT CREDITOR WU, DAVID ASSIGNED TO MASTER FINANCIAL 2000
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION APR-23-2001, CONTINUED BY COURT TO SEP-10-2001 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506 NO FURTHER CONTINUANCES. TRIAL TO PROCEED IN DEFENDANT'S ABSENCE TO APPEAR.
